problem id: b5e40e49
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  11110111 -> 00010000
  10100110 -> 10011000
  01001101 -> 00110011
  11000111 -> 01110110
  11011110 -> 01100111
  11111100 -> 01100111
  00111010 -> 00110011
  10000010 -> 01010100
  00101000 -> 01010101
  11011100 -> 00100011

query: 11001001
predicted answer: 10101011
